changelog:
🎵 Initial Release

✨ Features:
• YouTube Music Streaming - Access millions of songs
• Smart Search - Find songs, artists, and albums instantly
• Material Design UI - Clean and intuitive interface
• Fast & Lightweight - Optimized performance (4.3MB)
• Background Playback - Music continues while multitasking
• Auto Update System - Always get the latest features

🛠️ Technical:
• Built with Kotlin & Jetpack Compose
• ExoPlayer for smooth audio playback
• Material3 design system
• Coroutines for async operations

📱 Requirements:
• Android 8.0+ (API 26)
• 10MB free storage
• Internet connection for streaming
